parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-rotation-mon-ok-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'SUCCEEDED', correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').first().json.correlationId, actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-rotation-monitor', action: { action_type: 'ops.rotation_health_check', risk_tier: 'green', gateway_healthy: $json.gateway_healthy, has_rotation_failures: false, checked_at: $json.checked_at }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
